mapper.select: select * from biz_settlement_record order by create_time desc
select * from biz_settlement_record where order_id = #{orderId} limit 1
select * from biz_settlement_record where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update biz_settlement_record set bill_type = #{billType}, price_desc = #{priceDesc}, estimated_amount = #{estimatedAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, final_amount = #{finalAmount} where order_id = #{orderId} and settle_status = 'PENDING'

update biz_settlement_record set settle_status = 'CONFIRMED', final_amount = #{finalAmount}, settled_time = #{settledTime}, operator_user_id = #{operatorUserId} where order_id = #{orderId} and settle_status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: select * from biz_settlement_record where settle_status = 'REFUNDING' and settled_time is not null and settled_time <= #{beforeTime} order by settled_time asc limit #{limit}
